mapper.select: select * from users where id=#{id} and password=#{password}
select * from booking where bk_bd_state=1 and bk_time=#{bkTime}
mapper.update: update buildings set build_state=1 where build_name=#{bkBdName} and build_section=#{bkBdSection} and build_time=#{bkTime}
update booking set bk_bd_state='已撤销' where bk_pson_id=#{bkPsonId} and bk_time=#{bkTime} and bk_bd_state='未审核' and bk_bd_name=#{bkBdName} and bk_bd_section=#{bkBdSection};
update buildings set build_state=0 where build_name=#{bkBdName} and build_section=#{bkBdSection} and build_time=#{bkTime}
update booking set bk_bd_state=#{bkBdState} where bk_pson_id=#{bkPsonId} and bk_time=#{bkTime} and bk_bd_state='未审核' and bk_bd_name=#{bkBdName} and bk_bd_section=#{bkBdSection};
update buildings set build_state=2 where build_name=#{bkBdName} and build_section=#{bkBdSection} and build_time=#{bkTime}
update booking set bk_refused_reason=#{bkRefusedReason} where bk_pson_id=#{bkPsonId} and bk_time=#{bkTime} and bk_bd_state='已驳回' and bk_bd_name=#{bkBdName} and bk_bd_section=#{bkBdSection};
